title: Add Design Tokens
description: Extract hardcoded values into CSS custom properties.
hint: Find repeated colors, spacing, and font sizes. Define them in :root.
solution: :root { --primary: #0055CC; --spacing: 1rem; --radius: 8px; --font: system-ui; } Replace hardcoded values with var() calls.
starterCode:
.btn { background: #0055CC; color: white; border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px; }
.card { border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px; }

title: Refactor to BEM
description: Convert flat CSS classes to BEM naming convention.
hint: Identify blocks, elements, and modifiers. Rename classes.

title: Organize CSS File Structure
description: Split a monolithic CSS file into a logical file structure.
hint: Separate into: reset, variables, typography, layout, components, utilities.
solution: Create files: _reset.css, _variables.css, _typography.css, _layout.css, components/_button.css, utilities.css. Use @import in main.css.

title: Add CSS Documentation
description: Add proper documentation comments to a CSS component.
hint: Document component purpose, HTML structure, modifiers, and usage examples.
solution:
/**
 * Button Component
 * Usage: <button class="btn btn--primary">
 * Modifiers: btn--primary, btn--secondary, btn--large
 */

title: CSS Architecture Migration
description: Plan and execute migrating a legacy CSS codebase to a modern architecture.
hint: Audit → Plan → Extract tokens → Refactor components → Set up layers → Add linting → Document.
solution: Create migration plan: 1) Audit current CSS 2) Define tokens 3) Implement BEM 4) Set up @layer 5) Configure Stylelint 6) Write style guide 7) Refactor incrementally.
